items.text: The GCAS_Monitor component shall define vertical acceleration as 100.0
items.fragment: The GCAS_Monitor component shall define vertical acceleration as 100.0
items.requirement_fragment: The GCAS_Monitor component shall define vertical acceleration as 100.0

items.text: The GCAS_Monitor component shall define expected impact time as 15.0
items.fragment: The GCAS_Monitor component shall define expected impact time as 15.0
items.requirement_fragment: The GCAS_Monitor component shall define expected impact time as 15.0

items.text: The GCAS_Monitor component shall define recovery time as 5.0
items.fragment: The GCAS_Monitor component shall define recovery time as 5.0
items.requirement_fragment: The GCAS_Monitor component shall define recovery time as 5.0

items.text: The altitudeFromGround variable shall be computed by invoking the Agree_Nodes::height function using the current altitude, vertical velocity, and a minimum height time of 0.5 seconds
items.fragment: The altitudeFromGround variable shall be computed by invoking the Agree_Nodes::height function using the current altitude, vertical velocity, and a minimum height time of 0.5 seconds
items.requirement_fragment: The altitudeFromGround variable shall be computed by invoking the Agree_Nodes::height function using the current altitude, vertical velocity, and a minimum height time of 0.5 seconds

items.text: When altitude <= 30.0 or altitudeFromGround <= 500.0, then gcasRequested = true
